name: Coconut Beer Batter Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 4 Dozen medium shrimp, peeled and deveined (about 2 lbs.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ingredients for the seasoning mix in a small bowl and set aside.
2. Mix 1 1/4 cups of flour, 2 tablespoons of the seasoning mix, baking powder, eggs, and beer together in a bowl until smooth, breaking up all lumps.
3. Mix the remaining flour with 1 1/2 teaspoons of the seasoning mix. Place the coconut in a separate bowl.
4. Sprinkle both sides of the shrimp with the remaining seasoning mix. Dredge each shrimp first in the flour mixture, shaking off excess, then dip in batter and allow excess to drip off. Coat each shrimp with coconut before placing on a baking sheet.
5. Heat the deep fryer to 350°F. Drop each shrimp into the hot oil and cook until golden brown (about 1/2 to 1 minute per side). Avoid overcrowding the fryer.
6. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately. Enjoy with warm orange marmalade.
